sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n103527" key="te/trarxos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τέτραρχ-ος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n103527.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">τετράρχης</ref> </xr> (q.v.).</sense> </entryFree>
